race.comment: ROCKBARTON MARSHAL (2) bounced off his good debut second, with a strong on-pace win over 1200m at Port Macquarie. Has a stack of upside and will relish the conditions. LOOK AT MEGO (15) travelled wide throughout and faded quickly in the run to finish a long last over 1312m at this track on May 5. Gets a better set-up for this and look for a sharp form reversal. ALTAIR I AM (1) two runs back on the provincial circuit have been ordinary and should find this more to his liking with Dalton's 2kg claim. Improver in the small field. DAM IMPACT (12) jumped in trip when she handled the heavy (8) conditions to get off the mark at start six over 1412m here. Scratchings help her cause and don't dismiss.
